title: Causal Code
status: Formal refinement draft for peer-review-facing development
central_thesis: Cast every dependency between objects, proofs, tools, and papers as a typed causal edge.

claims.primary_content: Cast every dependency between objects, proofs, tools, and papers as a typed causal edge.
claims.required_action: Separate method claims from domain claims before peer-review promotion.

math.primary_content: Use the paper body axioms, lemmas, and formalism as the math intake.
math.required_action: Promote every symbolic statement into a normalized claim row with assumptions and receipts.

formal_algebra_calculus.required_action: Split normal form, closed form, algebraic operators, calculus/window operators, and open obligations.

hand_work.primary_content: Use 03-CQE-workbook/WORKBOOK.md plus the analog toolkit guides.
hand_work.required_action: Write the physical reconstruction steps and boundary-collision handling for the paper.

code_rebuild.required_action: Bind a replayable command or mark the missing executable as an obligation.

lib_bindings.required_action: Resolve this binding into production/lib-forge or mark it as an adapter route.

tests_and_receipts.primary_content: Every validation and diagnostic must support hidden-guess ablation when training mode is enabled.
tests_and_receipts.required_action: Add positive, negative, boundary, and wrap tests with receipts.

deployment_kernel.primary_content: Deployable individually as CQE-paper-06 and selectable through the master suite.
deployment_kernel.required_action: Expose paper, block, and suite selectors with no duplicate routing logic.
